overview: DungeonScribe is a comprehensive D&D character, army, and campaign management app for the Internet Computer. It supports multiple characters and armies with deep customization for spells, races, classes, feats, items, abilities, and more. Features include a full Army management system, world building tools, campaign organization, global search, cross-entity linking, and mobile-friendly design.
features: Army system with 17+ management panels and H.M.C. Military rank preset (72 ranks)
Multiclass support with per-class spell slot tracking
Battle simulator for army vs army outcomes
Party XP tracker and loot distribution log
Customizable app theme with accent color picker
